name: Nano Banana Pro
description: Runs production-grade Nano Banana Pro image generation and editing workflows with strict brand compliance, reference-image handling, layout fidelity, text rendering guidance, and packaged prompt templates.

variables.name: objective
variables.description: What the visual needs to achieve

variables.name: platform
variables.description: Placement channel such as Instagram or Facebook

variables.name: brand_kit
variables.description: Brand colors, fonts, templates, and style rules

variables.name: template_assets
variables.description: Layout or composition templates that must be followed

variables.name: overlay_text
variables.description: Headline or copy that must appear on the image
